/usr/local/opt/llvm/bin/clang++  -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -fuse-ld=/usr/local/opt/lld/bin/ld64.lld "CMakeFiles/symphony-validator.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/symphony-validator.dir/src/cli.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/symphony-validator.dir/src/evidence.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/symphony-validator.dir/src/paths.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/symphony-validator.dir/src/skvi_index.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/symphony-validator.dir/src/sclv_changelog.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/symphony-validator.dir/src/cross_reference.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/symphony-validator.dir/src/vocabulary.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/symphony-validator.dir/src/sclv_shape.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/symphony-validator.dir/src/artifacts.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/symphony-validator.dir/src/canonical_surfaces.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/symphony-validator.dir/src/validator_contracts.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/symphony-validator.dir/src/runtime_contracts.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/symphony-validator.dir/src/knowledge_contracts.cpp.o" -o symphony-validator
